name: TSUUFUUKA NO JUTSU (GOUT OF FIRE TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Katon)

Rank: 1 (Spell Level 1)

Chakra Cost: 3

Learn DC: 13 | Successes: 1

Perform: 1 | Perform DC: 12

Components: C, Mas, S

You focus Chakra in your mouth, breathing out a very short stream of fire against a creature within the same square of you, or an object within 1 ft of you. A creature takes 1 fire damage per round (Reflex negates, one save per round), while objects are affected differently and receive no save:

- First Round - Combustible and easily flammable materials catch fire. Meat can be cooked 'very rare'.
- Second Round - Metal becomes warm and uncomfortable to touch. Meat can be cooked 'medium'.
- Third Round - Metal becomes hot, dealing 1 fire damage when touched. Meat can be cooked 'well done'.
- Fourth Round - Metal becomes searing, dealing 1d4 fire damage when touched. Meat is severely overcooked and is barely edible.
- Fifth Round and up - Metal can be used for crafting purposes such as smithing. Meat is carbonized and entirely inedible.

Heated metal will cool within one round. Especially well-crafted or reinforced metallic items may be able to resist being melted down (GM's discretion).

Mastery: Each step increases the maximum duration by 1 round.
